programs.title: California Live
programs.desc: A daily lifestyle show that takes a ride through all of California, discovering many of the hidden treasures the state and its people have to offer including beauty, glamour, fitness, food, health, and tech.

programs.title: NBC News Daily
programs.desc: NBC News provides viewers with the latest national and international news; consumer, health and personal finance reporting; up-to-the-minute local news.

programs.title: Access Daily With Mario & Kit
programs.desc: Actress Jocelyn Hudon (NBC's "Chicago Fire"); TikTok influencer Corey B (Netflix's "Netflix Is a Joke!"); astrologer Richard James; Dina Doll shares legal updates; food trends in the news!

programs.title: The Kelly Clarkson Show
programs.desc: Cameoke: "I'll Take You"; Goldie Hawn; "Celebrity Superlatives"; Daniel Dae Kim; Teacher of the Year 2026; Anna Konkle.

programs.title: NBC4 News at 3pm
programs.desc: Stay informed with the latest breaking news and headlines.

programs.title: NBC Nightly News With Tom Llamas
programs.desc: Tom Llamas anchors the latest news, going beyond the headlines to see how lives are affected by the world around them.
